PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?business ?businessLabel WHERE {
  ?business wdt:P31 wd:Q43289 ; wdt:P105 wd:Q224546 ; wdt:P6374 ?addressEntity ; wdt:P571 ?inception .
  ?addressEntity rdfs:label ?addressString .
  FILTER(LANG(?addressString) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?addressString) , 'savile row'))
  FILTER(YEAR(?inception) >= 1901 && YEAR(?inception) <= 2000)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?business rdfs:label ?businessLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?businessLabel) = 'en')
  }
}
